Title: Loop Previous And Set Offset In Circle From Arg
Description: Loop and sets the offset in the shape of a circle each time using integer (number) tool args

Options.Description: The index to jump to repeat the loop
Options.Label: Stored Index Name

Options.Description: The name of the integer (number) tool arg to load the number of points on the circle from.
Options.Label: Number of Circle Points Arg

Options.Description: The name of the integer (number) tool arg to load the radius of the circle from.
Options.Label: Circle Radius Arg

Options.Description: If checked, flips the direction the points on the circle are looped over
Options.Label: Flip Direction

Options.Description: If checked, rotates the points on the circle that are looped over
Options.Label: Rotate Direction
